scripts.migration:run:init: cd apps/api && npx ts-node -P ./tsconfig.json -r tsconfig-paths/register ../../node_modules/typeorm/cli.js migration:run -d ./src/migrations/data-source.ts
scripts.migration:run:pre-deploy: cd apps/api && npx ts-node -P ./tsconfig.json -r tsconfig-paths/register ../../node_modules/typeorm/cli.js migration:run -d ./src/migrations/pre-deploy/data-source.ts
scripts.migration:run:post-deploy: cd apps/api && npx ts-node -P ./tsconfig.json -r tsconfig-paths/register ../../node_modules/typeorm/cli.js migration:run -d ./src/migrations/post-deploy/data-source.ts
